name: Daiquiri Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crust ingredients and press into the bottom of a springform pan. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
2. Soften gelatin in a small saucepan with 3/4 cup water, stirring constantly until dissolved.
3. In a large bowl, beat egg yolks and sugar until light and fluffy. Gradually add the gelatin mixture along with lime juice, rum, and peel, cooking over medium heat while stirring constantly until thickened and bubbly.
4. Cool the mixture to room temperature.
5. Beat cream cheese in another large bowl until smooth. Gradually add the cooled gelatin mixture and blend well. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form, then fold into the batter. Add powdered sugar and continue beating until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold in whipped cream and beat until combined.
7. Pour the filling into the crust and refrigerate for several hours or overnight before serving.
